originalTitle: TV tonight: Emilia Clarke’s stylish, fun cold war thriller
summary: Haley Lu Richardson, Adrian Lester and Harriet Walter also star in Ponies. Plus: inside the world’s biggest curry restaurant. Here’s what to watch this evening
content: Ponies 9pm, Sky Atlantic A starry, stylish and even fun cold war thriller. Bea (Emilia Clarke) is a highly educated Russian-speaking secretary. Twila (Haley Lu Richardson) is a very street-smart woman – the kind who calls a local a “bitch” for selling cracked eggs. Together, they make a good team as Ponies – that’s “persons of no interest” – to find out how their husbands were really killed in Moscow. Adrian Lester and Harriet Walter also star. Hollie Richardson World’s Biggest Curry Restaurant 8pm, Channel 4 It takes 150 staff to run the largest Pakistani and Indian curry house on the planet – the Royal Nawaab in Stockport, Greater Manchester. How does owner Mahboob Hussain manage such an operation seven days a week? He invites the cameras behind the scenes to find out, as chefs race to feed thousands of guests delicious food night after night. HR Hidden Treasures of the National Trust 9pm, BBC Two A juicier episode of the Toby Jones-narrated cultural conservation series. A scandalous society portrait reveals the story behind a love triangle and, along with other items, shows how the legacy of the Grand Tour still shapes the UK’s great houses today. HR Smoggie Queens 10pm, BBC Three More fun with Phil Dunning’s bold, brash and hilarious comedy. The queens help – or, more accurately, hinder – Stewart (Elijah Young) with his first ever date, as they head to the same restaurant to eavesdrop on how things are going. Cue some cracking lines and near disasters. HR Hacks 10.05pm, Sky Atlantic The brilliant comedy reaches its penultimate episode, having pleased fans in this fifth and final season by hating on AI and throwing some red meat towards viewers who want Deborah (Jean Smart) and Ava (Hannah Einbinder) to become a slightly unlikely couple. There are always, however, the usual arguments to be had and jokes to be written. Jack Seale St Denis Medical 11.40pm, BBC One A double bill of the amiable – if retro – US mockumentary. Alex’s attempts at altruism backfire when she accidentally donates $1,000 instead of $100 to a fundraiser for Parker’s dog. And Joyce’s boyfriend visits the hospital, having swallowed a marble from a kids’ board game in a desperate bid for her attention. Hannah J Davies Film choice The Bride! (Maggie Gyllenhaal, 2025), 9.50am, 8pm, Sky Cinema Premiere An unholy splicing of Bonnie and Clyde and Baz Luhrmann (with a knowing wink to Mel Brooks), Maggie Gyllenhaal’s 1930s gothic horror is a riot from start to finish. Chicago gangster’s cohort Ida (a stupendously energetic Jessie Buckley) is possessed by the spirit of Mary Shelley, then dies and is resurrected – at the behest of Frankenstein’s monster, Frank (Christian Bale) – as a punky rebel. Frank’s love of film musicals is the thread that ties together a wild fantasy of girl-power rage and outsider romance. Simon Wardell
chineseTitle: 今晚的电视节目：艾米莉亚·克拉克的时尚有趣的冷战惊悚片
chineseSummary: 海莉·露·理查森、阿德里安·莱斯特和哈里特·沃尔特也在《小马》中出演。另外：在世界上最大的咖喱餐厅内。这是今晚要看的内容
chineseContent: 《小马》晚上 9 点，Sky Atlantic 一部精彩、时尚、甚至有趣的冷战惊悚片。比亚（艾米莉亚·克拉克 饰）是一位受过高等教育、讲俄语的秘书。特维拉（海莉·露·理查森饰）是一位非常街头聪明的女人，她会因为当地人出售破裂的鸡蛋而称其为“婊子”。他们作为“小马”（即“无利害关系者”）组成了一支优秀的团队，以查明他们的丈夫是如何在莫斯科被杀害的。阿德里安·莱斯特和哈丽特·沃尔特也出演。 Hollie Richardson 世界上最大的咖喱餐厅 晚上 8 点，第 4 频道 位于大曼彻斯特斯托克波特的 Royal Nawaab 餐厅需要 150 名员工来经营全球最大的巴基斯坦和印度咖喱餐厅。业主 Mahboob Hussain 如何每周 7 天管理这样的业务？他邀请幕后的摄像机来一探究竟，厨师们竞相夜复一夜地为成千上万的客人提供美味佳肴。 HR 国家信托基金会的隐藏宝藏 晚上 9 点，BBC 第二台 由托比·琼斯 (Toby Jones) 讲述的文化保护系列节目中精彩的一集。一幅丑闻的社会肖像揭示了三角恋背后的故事，并与其他物品一起展示了壮游的遗产如何塑造当今英国的伟大房屋。 HR Smoggie Queens 晚上 10 点，BBC Three More 播放 Phil Dunning 大胆、傲慢且搞笑的喜剧。皇后们帮助——或者更准确地说，阻碍——斯图尔特（伊利亚·杨饰）第一次约会，他们前往同一家餐厅偷听事情的进展。提示一些裂缝和灾难。 HR Hacks 晚上 10 点 05 分，Sky Atlantic 这部精彩的喜剧迎来了倒数第二集，在第五季也是最后一季中，通过憎恨人工智能，并向那些希望黛博拉（吉恩·斯玛特饰）和艾娃（汉娜·艾因宾德饰）成为一对不太可能的情侣的观众扔了一些红肉，让粉丝们感到高兴。然而，总有一些
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
